reviews.comment:
Muy linda la estación de servicio, que antes era del ACA. Siempre parábamos  con mis padres cuando viajabámos para Lincoln. Los baños limpios siempre.

(Translated by Google)
The gas station, which used to be an ACA station, is very nice. My parents and I always stopped there when we traveled to Lincoln. The bathrooms are always clean.
